title: [Reassociate][DebugInfo] Salvage debug info before rewriting expression
author: phyBrackets
description:
When RewriteExprTree modifies instruction operands, call `salvageDebugInfo()` before `setOperand()` so debug value expressions are rewritten while original operands are still intact. This preserves variable accessibility in debuggers instead of dropping values to poison.

Fixes #60532
Fixes #61272

tests.test_body:
target datalayout = "e-m:e-i64:64-f80:128-n8:16:32:64-S128"
target triple = "x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu"

@b = external hidden constant [2 x i32], align 4

define dso_local i64 @example(i32 noundef %year, i32 noundef %mon, i32 noundef %mday) !dbg !6 {
entry:
  %idxprom = sext i32 %mon to i64, !dbg !16
  %arrayidx = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr @b, i64 %idxprom, !dbg !16
  %0 = load i32, ptr %arrayidx, align 4, !dbg !16
    #dbg_value(i32 %mday, !15, !DIExpression(), !17)
  %dec = add nsw i32 %mday, -1, !dbg !18
    #dbg_value(i32 %dec, !15, !DIExpression(), !17)
  %add = add nsw i32 %year, %0, !dbg !19
  %add1 = add nsw i32 %add, %dec, !dbg !20
  %conv = sext i32 %add1 to i64, !dbg !21
  ret i64 %conv, !dbg !22
}

!llvm.dbg.cu = !{!0}
!llvm.module.flags = !{!3, !4, !5}

!0 = distinct !DICompileUnit(language: DW_LANG_C99, file: !1, isOptimized: true, runtimeVersion: 0, emissionKind: FullDebug, enums: !2)
!1 = !DIFile(filename: "example.c", directory: "/tmp")
!2 = !{}
!3 = !{i32 2, !"Dwarf Version", i32 4}
!4 = !{i32 2, !"Debug Info Version", i32 3}
!5 = !{i32 1, !"wchar_size", i32 4}
!6 = distinct !DISubprogram(name: "example", scope: !1, file: !1, line: 3, type: !7, scopeLine: 3, flags: DIFlagPrototyped, spFlags: DISPFlagDefinition | DISPFlagOptimized, unit: !0, retainedNodes: !11)
!7 = !DISubroutineType(types: !8)
!8 = !{!9, !10, !10, !10}
!9 = !DIBasicType(name: "long", size: 64, encoding: DW_ATE_signed)
!10 = !DIBasicType(name: "int", size: 32, encoding: DW_ATE_signed)
!11 = !{!12, !13, !14, !15}
!12 = !DILocalVariable(name: "year", arg: 1, scope: !6, file: !1, line: 3, type: !10)
!13 = !DILocalVariable(name: "mon", arg: 2, scope: !6, file: !1, line: 3, type: !10)
!14 = !DILocalVariable(name: "mday", arg: 3, scope: !6, file: !1, line: 3, type: !10)
!15 = !DILocalVariable(name: "day", scope: !6, file: !1, line: 6, type: !10)
!16 = !DILocation(line: 8, column: 14, scope: !6)
!17 = !DILocation(line: 6, column: 7, scope: !6)
!18 = !DILocation(line: 7, column: 6, scope: !6)
!19 = !DILocation(line: 8, column: 12, scope: !6)
!20 = !DILocation(line: 8, column: 20, scope: !6)
!21 = !DILocation(line: 8, column: 10, scope: !6)
!22 = !DILocation(line: 8, column: 3, scope: !6)

; ModuleID = '<stdin>'
source_filename = "reassociate_dbgvalue_discard.c"
target datalayout = "e-m:e-i64:64-f80:128-n8:16:32:64-S128"
target triple = "x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nounwind memory(none) uwtable
define dso_local i32 @test1(i32 %a, i32 %b, i32 %c, i32 %d) local_unnamed_addr #0 !dbg !7 {
entry:
  %m1 = mul i32 %c, %a, !dbg !20
    #dbg_value(i32 %m1, !16, !DIExpression(), !21)
  %m2 = mul i32 %c, %b, !dbg !22
    #dbg_value(i32 %m2, !17, !DIExpression(), !23)
  %m3 = mul i32 %m1, %d, !dbg !24
    #dbg_value(i32 %m3, !18, !DIExpression(), !25)
  %m4 = mul i32 %m2, %d, !dbg !26
    #dbg_value(i32 %m4, !19, !DIExpression(), !27)
  %res = xor i32 %m3, %m4
  ret i32 %res, !dbg !28
}

attributes #0 = { nounwind memory(none) uwtable }

!llvm.dbg.cu = !{!0}
!llvm.module.flags = !{!3, !4, !5}
!llvm.ident = !{!6}

!0 = distinct !DICompileUnit(language: DW_LANG_C99, file: !1, producer: "clang version 7.0.0 (trunk 330596) (llvm/trunk 330594)", isOptimized: true, runtimeVersion: 0, emissionKind: FullDebug, enums: !2)
!1 = !DIFile(filename: "reassociate_dbgvalue_discard.c", directory: "")
!2 = !{}
!3 = !{i32 2, !"Dwarf Version", i32 4}
!4 = !{i32 2, !"Debug Info Version", i32 3}
!5 = !{i32 1, !"wchar_size", i32 4}
!6 = !{!"clang version 7.0.0 (trunk 330596) (llvm/trunk 330594)"}
!7 = distinct !DISubprogram(name: "test1", scope: !1, file: !1, line: 3, type: !8, scopeLine: 3, flags: DIFlagPrototyped, spFlags: DISPFlagDefinition | DISPFlagOptimized, unit: !0, retainedNodes: !11)
!8 = !DISubroutineType(types: !9)
!9 = !{!10, !10, !10, !10, !10}
!10 = !DIBasicType(name: "int", size: 32, encoding: DW_ATE_signed)
!11 = !{!12, !13, !14, !15, !16, !17, !18, !19}
!12 = !DILocalVariable(name: "a", arg: 1, scope: !7, file: !1, line: 3, type: !10)
!13 = !DILocalVariable(name: "b", arg: 2, scope: !7, file: !1, line: 3, type: !10)
!14 = !DILocalVariable(name: "c", arg: 3, scope: !7, file: !1, line: 3, type: !10)
!15 = !DILocalVariable(name: "d", arg: 4, scope: !7, file: !1, line: 3, type: !10)
!16 = !DILocalVariable(name: "t1", scope: !7, file: !1, line: 4, type: !10)
!17 = !DILocalVariable(name: "t2", scope: !7, file: !1, line: 5, type: !10)
!18 = !DILocalVariable(name: "t3", scope: !7, file: !1, line: 6, type: !10)
!19 = !DILocalVariable(name: "t4", scope: !7, file: !1, line: 7, type: !10)
!20 = !DILocation(line: 4, column: 14, scope: !7)
!21 = !DILocation(line: 4, column: 7, scope: !7)
!22 = !DILocation(line: 5, column: 14, scope: !7)
!23 = !DILocation(line: 5, column: 7, scope: !7)
!24 = !DILocation(line: 6, column: 15, scope: !7)
!25 = !DILocation(line: 6, column: 7, scope: !7)
!26 = !DILocation(line: 7, column: 15, scope: !7)
!27 = !DILocation(line: 7, column: 7, scope: !7)
!28 = !DILocation(line: 8, column: 3, scope: !7)

comments.author: phyBrackets
comments.body:
> Looks like the core of the change is correct, thanks for working on this! 😄
> 
> I think it would be good to also add a new test from one of the fixed issues (probably in a reduced form) to ensure they are covered.
> 
> > And now can we remove this safely? this seems like a dead code as modified instructions has already been salvaged before their operands were rewritten.
> > ```
> > if (ClearFlags)
> >         replaceDbgUsesWithUndef(ExpressionChangedStart);
> > ```
> 
> Yes, I think this can now be removed.

Thanks for the review. I have added the test.
